name: J. David Tax Law LLC
description_short: Tax attorney firm specializing in IRS debt relief, tax disputes, and resolution strategies for individuals and businesses across multiple states.
description_long:
J. David Tax Law LLC is a multi-state tax law firm with a primary office in Charlotte, NC, and additional locations across Florida, California, Texas, Arizona, Georgia, Maryland, New York, and Pennsylvania. The firm focuses exclusively on tax-related legal matters rather than general bankruptcy, though tax debt and IRS enforcement can intersect with financial distress situations. Founded on principles of direct attorney representation, the firm positions itself as distinct from tax resolution companies that use enrolled agents or caseworkers.

The firm offers comprehensive tax relief services including IRS Offer in Compromise negotiations, Fresh Start Program qualification assistance, Currently Not Collectible status applications, and wage garnishment release representation. They handle both federal tax issues (IRS audits, collections, penalties, and Tax Court representation) and state-level concerns (North Carolina Department of Revenue disputes, payroll tax liabilities, and sales tax issues). Additional specialized services include IRS passport revocation resolution, innocent spouse relief, tax litigation, IRS Criminal Investigation representation, and asset seizure defense.

J. David Tax Law differentiates itself through claims of having saved taxpayers over $800 million in resolved tax debt and award recognition for consistent case results. The firm emphasizes that all cases are managed directly by experienced tax attorneys rather than delegated to support staff or non-licensed representatives. They highlight local expertise in Mecklenburg County and North Carolina Department of Revenue procedures alongside federal IRS experience.

The primary limitation is that this is fundamentally a tax law firm, not a bankruptcy filing service. While tax debt can be discharged through bankruptcy and the firm may handle tax aspects of bankruptcy cases, their core business is tax negotiation and IRS representation rather than Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 filing services. Consumers seeking traditional bankruptcy filing assistance may need to engage a separate bankruptcy specialist, though tax attorneys often work alongside bankruptcy counsel in complex cases involving both tax and other unsecured debt.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Attorney-managed cases—all matters handled by licensed tax attorneys, not caseworkers or enrolled agents
Multi-state presence with 15+ office locations, enabling representation in multiple jurisdictions
Specialized expertise in both IRS and North Carolina Department of Revenue procedures
Documented results claim of $800+ million in taxpayer savings across hundreds of resolved cases
Free consultation available to assess eligibility and determine appropriate relief strategy
Handles full spectrum of tax issues: audits, collections, penalties, liens, levies, and wage garnishments
Offers IRS Fresh Start Program guidance and Currently Not Collectible status applications
cons: Marketing claims (e.g., '$800 million saved') lack independently verifiable documentation or third-party audit
Website does not disclose fee structures, retainer amounts, or pricing models for services
Primary service is tax negotiation/representation, not traditional bankruptcy filing—may require separate bankruptcy counsel for Chapter 7/13 cases
No visible customer review aggregation, ratings, or third-party verification on the website itself
Broad service offerings across multiple states and tax types may result in variable expertise depth depending on specific location and case complexity
best_for: Self-employed individuals and business owners with IRS wage garnishments, tax liens, or unpaid payroll tax liabilities
Taxpayers seeking Offer in Compromise negotiations or IRS Fresh Start Program eligibility assessment
Residents of North Carolina facing North Carolina Department of Revenue collection actions or state tax audits
High-income earners or business owners needing tax audit representation and IRS appeals
diagnosis: J. David Tax Law is best suited for taxpayers facing active IRS collections, wage garnishments, or tax liens who need attorney-led negotiation and relief strategy. The critical caveat is that this firm specializes in tax law and IRS representation, not traditional bankruptcy filing—consumers with complex financial situations involving both tax debt and significant unsecured or secured debt should verify whether separate bankruptcy counsel is needed alongside this firm's services.
services: Fresh Start Program qualification and enrollment
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
